summary: P0 Bug Testing Complete - Both bugs FIXED and verified. P0 Bug 1: Feedback submissions now appear on Admin Dashboard. P0 Bug 2: Browser back button no longer navigates to login page after authentication. All 7 Admin Dashboard tabs working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard.js properly refactored into 8 separate components in /app/frontend/src/components/admin/
Login.js correctly uses navigate('/app', { replace: true }) to prevent back button returning to login
POST /api/feedback/suggestion endpoint correctly saves feedback to MongoDB
GET /api/admin/feedback/all endpoint correctly retrieves all feedback with stats
seed_data_creation: Created test feedback items with TEST_UI_FEEDBACK and TEST_ADMIN_FEEDBACK prefixes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both P0 bugs are FIXED: 1) Feedback widget submissions now appear on Admin Dashboard User Feedback tab, 2) Browser back button after login goes to homepage, not login page. AdminDashboard refactored into 8 components. All 7 tabs (Overview, Visitors, Features, Payments, Satisfaction, Feature Requests, User Feedback) working correctly.

bug_1_feedback_not_appearing.verification: Submitted feedback via FeedbackWidget, verified it appears on Admin Dashboard User Feedback tab with correct category, rating, and message

bug_2_back_button_to_login.verification: After login, browser back button navigates to homepage (/) not login page (/login)

admin_dashboard_tabs_tested.Overview: PASS - Shows Daily Visitors, Generation Stats, Recent Users, Recent Payments
admin_dashboard_tabs_tested.User Feedback: PASS - Shows all user feedback with stats (Total: 4, Avg Rating: 4.5, Suggestions: 3)

mocked_apis.currency_rates: Currency exchange rates are hardcoded in backend
